parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "p_secret": "{{ $env.KOTE_SECRET }}",
  "p_client_id": "{{ $json.client_id }}",
  "p_interests": {{ $json.interests ? JSON.stringify($json.interests) : 'null' }},
  "p_budget_level": {{ $json.budget_level ? JSON.stringify($json.budget_level) : 'null' }},
  "p_last_intent": {{ $json.new_stage ? JSON.stringify($json.new_stage) : 'null' }},
  "p_last_tour_viewed": {{ $json.last_tour_viewed ? JSON.stringify($json.last_tour_viewed) : 'null' }},
  "p_arrival_date": {{ $json.arrival_date ? JSON.stringify($json.arrival_date) : 'null' }},
  "p_group_size": {{ $json.group_size || 'null' }},
  "p_has_children": {{ $json.has_children !== null ? $json.has_children : 'null' }}
}
